name: Plain Kugel
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Margarine (parve) or Butter (if dairy is acceptable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter with hot cooked noodles.
2. Add eggs and stir until well blended.
3. Season to taste.
4. Pour into a 9 x 13 pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for one hour.
6. Serve with roasted items. This recipe is forgiving, and for a lighter, taller kugel, beat the whites first (though this method isn't commonly used by the author). The author typically makes this dish only during special occasions like when little Sara comes to dinner.
